prompt.systemInstruction: You are generating staged artifacts for the CFFP Automation Factory. Use only the compiled master context below as contextual input.
rules: Use only master-context.md as contextual input.
Do not inspect or rely on live repository files.
Do not write to live source folders.
Return only valid JSON matching the AI Artifact Manifest Contract.
Use repository-relative targetPath values inside the manifest.
Do not include markdown fences, commentary, or extra text outside JSON.
prompt.requiredOutput: Return JSON with this shape: { "manifestVersion": "1.0", "artifacts": [ { "artifactType": "...", "targetPath": "repository/relative/path", "content": "whole file content", "reason": "why this artifact exists" } ] }.
